Write the word next to its meaning. 1. to keep safe

Read the story below. Think of the tallest person you know. Does their head touch the ceiling? If not, then they are not as tall as Robert Wadlow was. He is the tallest man in history. Robert Wadlow was a normal sized baby. His parents could carry him around. But all that soon changed.

Still, Robert did the same things as most boys his age. He collected stamps and liked taking pictures. He was also a boy scout for many years. Robert liked helping people. The clothes at the store were too small for Robert. His feet were 47cm long! Robert needed custom clothes and shoes. His clothes were made just for him. They were made to fit his big body. Robert was also too big for cars. His father made their car bigger. He moved the car seats to make room for Robert’s legs. Robert grew to be 272cm by age 22. He was a giant. His head touched the ceiling! Since Robert was so big, he ate a lot of food. He ate about four times as much as most people. Maybe that’s why he was 220kg.
Complete each sentence with a word from the box. Robert was as tall as a tree.
